title: Register Shifts in Writing
description: Switching smoothly between formal, semi-formal, and casual without losing the reader.
summary_pt_br: Mudanças de registro: vocabulário, tamanho da frase, pontuação, contrações. Usado com estratégia cria ênfase.

scenes.subtitle_en: Switching smoothly between formal, semi-formal, and casual without losing the reader.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Mudanças de registro: vocabulário, tamanho da frase, pontuação, contrações. Usado com estratégia cria ênfase.

scenes.text_en: Switching smoothly between formal, semi-formal, and casual without losing the reader. Focus: register shifts in writing. The committee's decision was both unprecedented and long overdue.
scenes.text_pt: Mudanças de registro: vocabulário, tamanho da frase, pontuação, contrações. Usado com estratégia cria ênfase. Foco: register shifts in writing. A decisão do comitê foi sem precedentes e há muito atrasada.

scenes.title: Register Shifts in Writing
scenes.body_en: Signal shifts through vocabulary (Latinate → Germanic), sentence length, punctuation (em dashes vs commas), and contractions. Used strategically, shifts create emphasis.
scenes.body_pt: Mudanças de registro: vocabulário, tamanho da frase, pontuação, contrações. Usado com estratégia cria ênfase.

examples.en: The committee's decision was both unprecedented and long overdue.
examples.pt: A decisão do comitê foi sem precedentes e há muito atrasada.

examples.en: Their report — if we can call it that — lacked rigor.
examples.pt: O relatório — se podemos chamá-lo assim — carecia de rigor.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Register Shifts in Writing

exercise.question: Complete: "The committee's decision was both ___ and long overdue."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The committee's decision was both unprecedented and long overdue."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A decisão do comitê foi sem precedentes e há muito atrasada.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Register Shifts in Writing — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre register shifts in writing. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Write one sentence in formal register.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The proposal was unprecedented and overdue.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Use an em dash to break register.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Their report — if we can call it that — lacked rigor.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Mix Latinate and Germanic in a single sentence.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Her argument was elegant, but it didn't stick.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Close with a crisp informal line.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Long story short: we got lucky.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Register shifts are punctuation for mood.

scenes.title: The editorial meeting
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize Zara's editing choices. Include at least two register shifts.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the magazine's editorial meeting, Zara explained why certain sentences needed to break their own rules.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: The committee's decision was both unprecedented and long overdue — notice the formal opening.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Honestly? It was about time. That abrupt register shift is exactly what the paragraph needed.

paragraphs.speaker: Editor
paragraphs.en: Em dashes signal an interruption in tone, as if the writer leans closer to the reader mid-sentence.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Long story short: register is not chosen once. It is negotiated across every paragraph.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Good style, the editors agreed, is the art of breaking the right rule at exactly the right moment.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Register Shifts in Writing". Switching smoothly between formal, semi-formal, and casual without losing the reader. The committee's decision was both unprecedented and long overdue. Honestly? It was about time. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Register Shifts in Writing". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Register Shifts in Writing".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Register Shifts in Writing".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
